# Apollo 11 CM Comanche 055 Provenance

- Mission/software family: Apollo 11 CM / Comanche 055
- Intended source reference:
  - Virtual AGC Comanche 055 listings and binaries
- Repo use today:
  - `app/src/main/assets/programs/apollo11/cm/comanche055/rope_excerpt.cfg`
    - Apollo-derived rope-word excerpt, read-only program data
  - `app/src/main/assets/programs/apollo11/cm/comanche055/erasable_init.cfg`
    - custom erasable initializer, not Apollo code
  - `app/src/main/assets/bootstrap/apollo11/cm/comanche055/bootstrap.cfg`
    - custom bootstrap/scenario data, not Apollo code
- Runtime status:
  - scaffold only
  - no CM execution path yet
